column1: # fr/analogy/capitals.tsv -- generated offline by bench/datagen (ADR 0001, phase P2).
# Generator model was Claude Opus 4.8 (LLM-proposed, human web-verified); build date 2026-07-22.
# Status of this file: LLM-proposed base pairs, then independently fact-verified against non-LLM sources; NOT a raw LLM dump.
# Relation type is capital-country; it is one-to-one and fact-verifiable (a capital has exactly one country).
# Verification sources (2026-07-22): Wikipedia 'List of national capitals' for the capital fact,
#   French Wikipedia 'Liste des capitales du monde' for the French spelling,
# Verified base pairs used: 63, at a 100 percent verification rate; canonical pairs live in bench/datagen/pairs/fr_capitals.tsv.
# Compiled deterministically with seed 0 and a per-base-pair source cap of K equal to 5 questions; 315 quadruples total.
# Every term is a single token under hyperhyper.preprocessing.tokenize_string; multi-token country names were excluded upstream.
